name: com.runmemento/memento
description: Local-first, LLM-agnostic memory layer for AI assistants.

packageArguments.description: Required subcommand. Starts the MCP stdio server.

environmentVariables.name: MEMENTO_DB
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the SQLite database file. Defaults to $XDG_DATA_HOME/memento/memento.db (typically ~/.local/share/memento/memento.db on POSIX).
